raw_source.title: [Remote] Old Fashion Research  is looking for Blockchain Technical Researcher
raw_source.body:
## About
**About Old Fashion Research**

Old Fashion Research(http://ofr.asia) is a multi-strategy crypto investment firm that actively covers from early seed to M&A opportunities in DeFi, GameFi, NFT, Fiat exchanges and Web3 infrastructure.

Old Fashion Research is founded by former senior management of the biggest crypto company together with experienced professionals from investment banking and crypto ventures background. Some of the cases invested by founding members:FTX,Axie Infinity,Genopets,Nansen,Moonbeam,etc.

News coverage: https://techcrunch.com/2022/05/26/former-binance-executives-launch-100m-crypto-fund/

## Responsibilities
- Lead the investment or incubation of Web3 technical infrastructure projects
- Publish research blogs from a technical perspective regularly
- Build connection with developers in crypto community


## Requirements
- Closely following latest progress of blockchain technology including but not limited to Ethereum 2.0,Layer2 solutions, Cross-Chain methods, Storage and etc
- A bachelor above degree in computer science or related field is not a must but would be a plus. Other proofs to validate your technical background would also be welcomed.
- Coding experience is a plus;

## Nice to Haves
- Being active in developers’ community or developer DAOs
-
## Job Nature

- Full-time or not: Full-Time/Intern

- Remote or not: Remote

## Salary and Benefits
- Base annually $40k-$80k (based on experience)+ Performance Bonus
- Annual outing
- Flexible Working Hours

## Work Location
Remote

## Contact
hr@ofr.asia
